ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "issuance_date" TEXT /* Date the product was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the product matures */,
  "barrier_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the barrier type */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the product */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., Active, Matured, Cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for product creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for product last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_barrier_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("barrier_type_id") REFERENCES barrier_types ("barrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "barrier_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barrier hit event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the barrier was hit */,
  "hit_value" REAL /* Value at which the barrier was hit */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Hit, Reverse) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for event creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for event last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barrier_events_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance quarter */,
  "issued_products" INTEGER /* Number of products issued in the quarter */,
  "matured_products" INTEGER /* Number of products matured in the quarter */,
  "products_beginning" INTEGER /* Number of products at the beginning of the quarter */,
  "products_end" INTEGER /* Number of products at the end of the quarter */,
  "products_intact" INTEGER /* Number of products with at least 1 day of intact barrier in the quarter */,
  "barrier_hit_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of barrier hit events to the total number of products in the quarter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for performance record creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for performance record last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_performance_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES performance_quarters ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for product type creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for product type last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "barrier_types" (
  "barrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barrier type */,
  "barrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the barrier type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the barrier type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for barrier type creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for barrier type last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("barrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for access log creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for access log last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES product_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance quarter (e.g., Q1-2020) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for performance quarter creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for performance quarter last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the risk assessment was conducted */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the risk assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for risk assessment creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for risk assessment last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the product on that date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product on that date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for historical data creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for historical data last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the predictive model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for predictive model creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for predictive model last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_results" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model used */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for forecast result creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for forecast result last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for notification creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for notification last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for audit log creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for audit log last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
